name: sip_participant_create
description: Initiate an outbound SIP/PSTN call and connect it as a participant in a LiveKit room. Requires 'call' grant permission.

parameters.name: sip_trunk_id
parameters.description: The outbound SIP trunk ID to use for the call.

parameters.name: sip_call_to
parameters.description: Phone number or SIP URI to call.

parameters.name: room_name
parameters.description: Room to connect the called participant to.

parameters.name: participant_identity
parameters.description: Identity for the SIP participant in the room.

parameters.name: participant_name
parameters.description: Display name for the SIP participant.
